nasb.text: They surrounded Benjamin, pursued them without rest and trod them down opposite Gibeah toward the east.

esv.text: Surrounding the Benjaminites, they pursued them and trod them down from Nohah as far as opposite Gibeah on the east.

cnv.text: 以色列人包圍了便雅憫人，從挪哈追趕他們，踐踏他們，直到基比亞對面日出之處。

ccb.text: 以色列人围攻便雅悯人，一路追杀他们直到基比亚的东边。
